context.repository_state: Backend is implemented under backend/ and frontend is implemented under frontend/.
approved_functional_scope: Dashboard KPIs, filters, due-date ordered list, and risk highlighting.
Obligation detail with masked tax id, document metadata, audit history, and backend-provided transitions.
Create and edit forms with basic UX validation and backend error display.
Status transition actions driven only by backend availableTransitions.
Consistent loading, empty, error, not-found, and conflict states.
constraints: Use Next.js App Router with React and strict TypeScript.
Use Server Components by default and Client Components only for real browser interactivity.
Use Server Actions for in-app mutations where appropriate.
Use Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui as component primitives.
Do not duplicate backend domain rules for transitions, document-gated submission, overdue, due soon, audit, or tax id masking.
Use backend-provided version as expectedVersion for existing-obligation mutations.
Do not store or log raw companyTaxId outside transient form submission state.

runtime.react_model: Server Components by default, Client Components at interaction leaves.
runtime.styling: Tailwind CSS with semantic tokens and shadcn/ui primitives.
runtime.ui_foundation: shadcn/ui components copied into the app and composed into feature-specific UI.
runtime.package_manager: Use the package manager selected during scaffold; default to npm if no repo-level package manager exists.

reasoning: Keeps backend/ and frontend/ clearly separated in the same repository.
src/ keeps route files, feature modules, and shared code grouped under the frontend app.
The alias avoids brittle relative imports once feature slices grow.

src/app.responsibility: Route segments, layouts, loading/error/not-found boundaries, metadata, and route-level composition.
must_not_do: No low-level fetch details directly inside deeply nested UI.
No broad client wrappers around whole pages unless required.

src/widgets.responsibility: Page-level compositions such as dashboard KPI strip, dashboard filter bar, obligations table, detail summary, document panel, audit trail, and action panel.
must_not_do: No mutation payload construction beyond calling feature actions.

src/features.responsibility: User operations: create obligation, edit obligation, change status, attach document metadata, remove document metadata, delete obligation, switch locale, and apply dashboard filters.
must_not_do: No state-machine validation beyond rendering backend-provided availability.

src/entities/obligation.responsibility: Obligation DTO types, UI-facing labels, lightweight display helpers, table row view models, and entity-specific presentational components.

src/shared/api.responsibility: Typed API client, endpoint functions, request/response DTOs, error normalization, and safe fetch defaults.
must_not_do: No browser storage of sensitive request payloads.

src/shared/i18n.responsibility: Locale routing helpers, dictionaries, enum label maps, error copy, and formatting helpers.
must_not_do: No domain decisions based on locale labels.
No raw enum display as primary user-facing text.

src/shared/ui.responsibility: shadcn/ui source components and small app-level wrappers for repeated layout or state patterns.

src/shared/config.responsibility: Environment variable access, API base URL resolution, and runtime-safe config validation.
must_not_do: No module-scope initialization of external service clients.
No hardcoded backend URL outside documented local defaults.

src/shared/lib.responsibility: Generic utilities such as className merge, date formatting wrappers, and non-domain collection helpers.

locale_strategy.decision: Use a simple locale route segment with /en and /es.
locale_strategy.rationale: Route-based locale keeps language visible, avoids user preference storage, and is enough to demonstrate en/es.

default_redirect.decision: Redirect / to the default locale dashboard.

not_found.decision: Use localized not-found states for invalid locale and missing obligations.

dashboard_page.component_model: Server Component route reads searchParams, fetches obligations from backend, derives UI-only KPI counts and filter results from backend-provided fields, and renders widgets.
client_boundaries: Filter controls that manage typed input or update URL search params.
Row action menus if they require browser interaction.
dashboard_page.rationale: Keeps initial dashboard fast and avoids shipping list data management logic to the client.

detail_page.component_model: Server Component fetches obligation detail and passes data to mostly server-rendered widgets.
client_boundaries: Status action controls with pending state and a visual natural-order guide.
Document metadata dialogs or forms if used inline.
detail_page.rationale: The detail record should be fresh and inspectable, while mutations stay isolated.

create_page.component_model: Server-rendered route shell with a Client Component form when controlled validation, pending state, and inline API error display are needed.
create_page.mutation_model: Server Action posts to backend and redirects or returns structured form errors.

edit_page.component_model: Server Component fetches current detail, then renders a Client Component form initialized from backend data.
edit_page.mutation_model: Server Action patches backend with expectedVersion and returned editable fields.

loading_and_errors.decision: Use route segment loading.tsx, error.tsx, and not-found.tsx plus component-level Alert/Empty/Skeleton states for nested states.

reads: Route Server Component calls shared API endpoint function.
API endpoint function fetches backend using API base URL and typed response parsing.
Server Component passes only required serializable data to widgets and Client Components.
Client Components receive minimal props needed for interactions.
mutations: Client form or action control invokes a Server Action.
Server Action validates basic form shape and calls shared API endpoint function.
Server Action sends expectedVersion for edit, status, document attach, and document delete operations where backend requires it.
Server Action maps normalized backend errors into form/action state.
On success, Server Action redirects or revalidates the relevant route so UI uses backend-returned or freshly fetched data.
dashboard_filtering: Backend list is the source for domain-derived fields.
Status, type, and due timing filters are represented in URL search params.
Name or owner matching uses a free-text query over loaded title and owner fields.
Filtering is UI-level narrowing, not domain validation.
kpi_derivation: Total, status counts, overdue count, and due-soon count are computed from the backend list response.
Counts use backend-provided status, isOverdue, and isDueSoon fields.
No frontend date arithmetic decides compliance risk.

server_only: API base URL access when it should not be exposed to the browser.
Fetches to backend for route data.
Server Actions for create, edit, status, document, and delete mutations.
KPI aggregation and URL-param filtering for initial dashboard render.
client_only: Filter input typing and URL update interactions.
Dialogs, dropdown menus, and confirmation modals.
Pending button state and inline action feedback.
Theme or locale switcher interactions if implemented as controls.
boundary_rules: Push use client as far down the tree as possible.
Do not wrap full route pages in Client Components.
Do not serialize raw companyTaxId into reusable props after successful submission.
Minimize props passed to Client Components to reduce RSC payload.

tax_id: Create and edit forms may temporarily hold companyTaxId as form input.
After submission, screens must use companyTaxIdMasked only.
Do not store companyTaxId in localStorage, sessionStorage, URL params, logs, analytics, toast payloads, or error details.
Do not print request bodies in client or server console logs.
errors: Show sanitized backend messages or localized copies by code.
Do not expose stack traces or raw backend validation internals beyond useful field-level messages.
auth: Do not add fake authorization gates that imply real security.

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_DEFAULT_LOCALE.description: Default app locale for root redirect.

BACKEND_API_BASE_URL.description: Server-side URL for FastAPI backend. Keep server-only unless browser direct fetch is intentionally introduced.

dto_types.ObligationDetail: ObligationListItem plus document: DocumentMetadata | null and auditHistory: AuditEvent[]

create.success: Redirect to detail page or render returned detail with companyTaxIdMasked.

edit.success: Revalidate detail/edit data and show returned version.

status_change.source: targetStatus options come from backend availableTransitions only.

notes: Metadata is derived from a selected local file; binary content is not uploaded.
storageKey may be omitted so backend can generate it.
Remove document uses an explicit requestSubmit call from the confirmation dialog so the form submit is not lost when the dialog portal closes.

libraries.name: next
libraries.purpose: App Router, Server Components, Server Actions, routing, and build system.
libraries.decision: Use latest stable patched Next.js available during implementation.
libraries.rationale: The challenge requires Next.js App Router and current patched releases reduce known RSC/security risk.

libraries.name: react and react-dom
libraries.purpose: UI runtime for Server and Client Components.
libraries.decision: Use React version compatible with selected Next.js release.

libraries.name: typescript
libraries.purpose: Strict DTO, form, action, and component typing.
libraries.decision: Enable strict mode and avoid any.
libraries.rationale: The challenge explicitly evaluates TypeScript quality.

libraries.name: tailwindcss
libraries.decision: Use Tailwind as scaffolded by current Next.js tooling.
libraries.rationale: Required stack and compatible with shadcn/ui.

libraries.name: shadcn/ui
libraries.purpose: Base UI primitives for table, cards, dialogs, forms, badges, buttons, dropdowns, empty/loading/error states.
libraries.decision: Install only needed components and compose them into feature widgets.
libraries.rationale: shadcn is a component source foundation, not the application architecture.

libraries.name: zod
libraries.purpose: Client/server form shape validation and action result typing.
libraries.decision: Use only for UX validation and request shape guardrails.
libraries.rationale: Improves form feedback without making frontend domain rules authoritative.

libraries.name: date-fns or Intl APIs
libraries.decision: Prefer Intl.DateTimeFormat first; add date-fns only if formatting needs exceed Intl.
libraries.rationale: Avoid unnecessary dependencies for simple date display.

libraries.name: vitest and testing-library
libraries.purpose: Unit/component tests for filtering, forms, error handling, and UI behavior.
libraries.decision: Use lightweight frontend tests aligned with React components.
libraries.rationale: The challenge asks for at least one frontend flow test; narrow tests are enough for this scope.

libraries.name: playwright
libraries.purpose: End-to-end smoke flow against local frontend and backend.
libraries.decision: Use for one critical flow if time allows after unit/component coverage.
libraries.rationale: Verifies the integrated user path and rendered UI states.

token_strategy.decision: Define semantic CSS custom properties for the approved Obsidian & Copper Ledger palette and map them into Tailwind/shadcn theme tokens.
token_strategy.visual_style: Premium compliance / fintech / legal-ops dashboard. Calm, serious, expensive, structured, highly usable, with Linear-level polish, Stripe-level clarity, Vanta/Drata compliance tooling cues, and modern editorial SaaS dashboard restraint.
token_strategy.rationale: The palette is fixed as product direction, while semantic token names keep components readable, themeable, and defensible.

theme_modes.decision: Use CSS variable values for each theme and avoid manual dark: color overrides in component code.
theme_modes.rationale: Token-based theming is easier to defend and audit than scattered color classes.

shadcn_rules: Use semantic classes such as bg-background and text-foreground instead of raw color utilities.
Use Badge for status and risk labels.
Use Alert for errors and warnings.
Use FieldGroup and Field for forms.
Use Select or ToggleGroup for constrained options.
Use Input for free-text name or owner query.
Use icons from the configured shadcn icon library and data-icon inside buttons.

visual_density.decision: Use a compact operational layout rather than marketing-style cards or hero sections.
visual_density.rationale: The app is a repeated-use compliance work surface.

must_avoid: Decorative visuals that reduce table scanability.

locale_model.invalid_locale_behavior: notFound or redirect to default locale.

formatting.numbers: Use Intl.NumberFormat where numeric display needs localization.
formatting.enums: Render localized labels from dictionaries, never raw enum strings as primary labels.

failure_modes.handling: Route error boundary or dashboard Alert shows localized retry path; KPIs are not shown as current if data failed.
Localized not-found page with link back to dashboard.
Map details to field errors when possible and show form-level fallback.
Show localized explanation and document metadata call to action.
Show a localized explanation when a mutation would leave an obligation in an invalid document state, such as removing required metadata from a submitted or done obligation.
Show localized action error, refresh detail route, and do not keep stale transition buttons as valid.
Show stale-data conflict state and offer refresh before retry; do not silently resubmit with a newer version.
Navigate to dashboard, revalidate obligation list, and show success feedback.

failure_modes.case: Delete fails because record is gone
failure_modes.handling: Treat as not-found recovery and return user to dashboard.
Fail visibly in development; use safe fallback in production only if necessary.

failure_modes.case: Raw companyTaxId included in backend error details unexpectedly
failure_modes.handling: Do not render details blindly; only render known field messages or sanitized generic copy.

unit_tests: DTO parser or type guard rejects malformed API responses without using any.
Dashboard KPI aggregation uses status, isOverdue, and isDueSoon from API items.
Dashboard filters narrow by selected status/type/due timing and free-text title/owner query.
Status action builder renders only availableTransitions from backend response.
Known API error codes map to localized user-facing messages.
Dictionaries contain labels for every known status, obligation type, and known error code.
component_tests: Dashboard empty state differs for no obligations vs no filter matches.
Create form does not render a workflow status field.
Edit form does not render a workflow status field and includes expectedVersion in mutation state.
Detail view displays companyTaxIdMasked and never displays companyTaxId.
Blocked submission explanation appears when submitBlockedReason is present.
Delete confirmation requires explicit confirmation before action.
integration_or_e2e_tests: Happy path: load dashboard, create obligation, land on detail, verify masked tax id display and pending status.
Status flow: detail renders backend-provided transition, submit transition, verify updated status and audit history.
Conflict flow: mutation receiving OBLIGATION_VERSION_CONFLICT shows refresh guidance.
i18n smoke: dashboard and known status labels render in en and es routes.
accessibility_checks: Forms have labels and validation states with aria-invalid where applicable.
Dialogs and alert dialogs have accessible titles.
Risk badges are accompanied by text labels, not color alone.
Loading and error states are perceivable without relying only on animation.
quality_gates: At least one frontend flow test exists for the challenge-required frontend behavior.
Manual or automated browser check verifies dashboard, detail, create, edit, and error states render without layout overlap.

implementation_phases.goal: Scaffold frontend project and base tooling under frontend/.
tasks: Create Next.js App Router project with TypeScript, Tailwind, ESLint, src directory, and @/* alias.
Initialize shadcn/ui and install only required base components.
Apply Tailwind/shadcn font and theme fixes required by the selected versions.
Add environment example for BACKEND_API_BASE_URL and default locale.
definition_of_done: Frontend app runs locally.
Strict TypeScript is enabled.
No route implements obligation UI yet.

implementation_phases.goal: Implement shared API, DTO, error, config, and i18n foundations.
tasks: Create strict DTO types matching backend response/request schemas.
Create safe API client and endpoint functions.
Create normalized error model for known backend errors.
Create en/es dictionaries and enum label maps.
Create semantic token theme baseline for light/dark.
definition_of_done: API functions are typed and do not use any.
Known backend error codes have localized labels.
Raw tax id is not part of read DTOs.

tasks: Create localized dashboard route.
Fetch obligations on the server.
Render KPIs from backend-provided fields.
Render filter controls and due-date ordered table.
Render loading, empty, and error states.
definition_of_done: Dashboard satisfies AC01 through AC05.
Filters do not recalculate backend domain state.
Dashboard works in en and es.

implementation_phases.goal: Build obligation detail route and read-only panels.
tasks: Create detail route and localized not-found handling.
Render safe fields, masked tax id, risk badges, document metadata, and audit history.
Render backend-provided available transitions and blocked submission explanation.
definition_of_done: Detail satisfies AC06 through AC10.
No raw tax id display exists.
Audit history is read-only.

tasks: Create shared obligation form model.
Implement create Server Action and create route.
Implement edit Server Action and edit route.
Map validation errors to localized field/form feedback.
definition_of_done: Create satisfies AC11 through AC13.
Edit satisfies AC14 and AC15.
No status selector appears in create or edit forms.

implementation_phases.goal: Build document metadata, status transition, and delete mutations.
tasks: Implement document attach/remove actions and UI.
Implement status transition actions driven by availableTransitions.
Implement guarded delete confirmation and recovery.
Handle conflict and domain errors consistently.
definition_of_done: Document metadata satisfies AC16 and AC17.
Status transition satisfies AC18 through AC20.
Delete satisfies AC22.

implementation_phases.goal: Complete quality pass, tests, and README frontend instructions.
tasks: Add unit and component tests for critical frontend behavior.
Add at least one frontend flow test.
Verify en/es labels and light/dark rendering.
Run typecheck, lint, tests, and browser smoke checks.
Document frontend setup and run commands in README.
definition_of_done: Challenge-required frontend test coverage exists.
Quality gates pass.
README explains how to run backend plus frontend.

approval_gate.required_user_action: No approval gate remains; implementation is complete and this spec is retained as aligned technical documentation.
approval_gate.next_step_after_approval: Use this spec as reference for maintenance and presentation.
